picks.reasoning: With only one match available, France at 2.50 is the most defensible selection — home nation advantage in a World Cup semifinal context carries significant weight, and France's tournament pedigree in high-stakes knockout football is well-documented. However, I must note these odds sit outside my preferred 1.40–2.20 range, which elevates risk; the pick is made pragmatically given no alternatives exist. Stake conservatively.

France at home turf energy in a World Cup semi, nah that's value right there. Spain are class but France in knockout footy with Mbappé and the boys under the pump? They turn up. Yamal talking big game but France have seen it all before.

Lamine Yamal himself said he's NOT afraid — and when a generational talent talks like that on the biggest stage, you LISTEN. Spain's tiki-taka machine has been dismantling teams all tournament, and France without peak form is vulnerable to their press. Give me La Roja at 3.3 and let the kid write his legend.
